mapper.select: SELECT fp.id AS "footprintId", fp.target_type AS "targetType", fp.target_id AS "targetId", fp.create_time AS "createTime", COALESCE( a.title, a5.title, SUBSTRING(p_sub.content, 1, 40), c.title, w.title, '' ) AS "title", COALESCE( a.cover_image, a5.cover_image, SUBSTRING_INDEX(p_sub.images, ',', 1), c.cover_image, SUBSTRING_INDEX(w.images, ',', 1), '' ) AS "coverImage" FROM footprint fp LEFT JOIN article a ON fp.target_type = 1 AND fp.target_id = a.article_id LEFT JOIN article a5 ON fp.target_type = 5 AND fp.target_id = a5.article_id AND a5.category_id = 1 LEFT JOIN post p_sub ON fp.target_type = 2 AND fp.target_id = p_sub.post_id LEFT JOIN course c ON fp.target_type = 3 AND fp.target_id = c.course_id LEFT JOIN user_work w ON fp.target_type = 4 AND fp.target_id = w.work_id WHERE fp.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY fp.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
